posts.author: AmitK (Amit)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! First time poster!

I’m looking for a way to programmatically connect to the “My Work” View, as that would eliminate the need to maintain a list of boards where I’m mentioned, and reduce the number of API requests I’m going to make (and it’s future proof).

Is this integrated somehow and I just can’t find it? Or is there another way to programatticaly get everything I’m supposed to be doing?

Thanks!
